mapper.select: SELECT AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, AUTHOR_NM AS authorNm, AUTHOR_DC AS authorDc FROM COMTNAUTHORINFO WHERE AUTHOR_CODE NOT LIKE 'IS_AUTHENTICATED_%' AND AUTHOR_CODE != 'ROLE_ANONYMOUS' ORDER BY CASE WHEN AUTHOR_CODE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, AUTHOR_CODE
SELECT AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, AUTHOR_NM AS authorNm, AUTHOR_DC AS authorDc, AUTHOR_CREAT_DE AS authorCreatDe FROM COMTNAUTHORINFO WHERE AUTHOR_CODE = #{_parameter}

SELECT F.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(D.CODE_NM, F.MENU_CODE) AS menuNm, COALESCE(NULLIF(D.CODE_DC, ''), D.CODE_NM, F.MENU_CODE) AS menuNmEn, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, F.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode, F.FEATURE_NM AS featureNm, F.FEATURE_NM_EN AS featureNmEn, F.FEATURE_DC AS featureDc, F.USE_AT AS useAt FROM COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = F.MENU_CODE AND ( (F.MENU_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND D.CODE_ID = 'AMENU1') OR (F.MENU_CODE LIKE 'H%' AND D.CODE_ID = 'HMENU1') ) ORDER BY F.MENU_CODE, F.FEATURE_CODE

SELECT M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl FROM COMTNMENUINFO M LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') != '' ORDER BY M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_CODE

SELECT M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, F.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode FROM COMTNMENUINFO M INNER JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.MENU_CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') != '' AND F.FEATURE_CODE LIKE '%\_VIEW' ESCAPE '\' ORDER BY M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_CODE, F.FEATURE_CODE

SELECT M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl FROM COMTNMENUINFO M LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/%' AND COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') != '#' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F WHERE F.MENU_CODE = M.MENU_CODE AND COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND F.FEATURE_CODE LIKE '%\_VIEW' ESCAPE '\' ) ORDER BY M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_CODE

SELECT R.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, COALESCE(A.AUTHOR_NM, R.AUTHOR_CODE) AS authorNm, R.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode, COALESCE(F.MENU_CODE, '') AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, CASE WHEN F.FEATURE_CODE IS NULL THEN 'FEATURE_MISSING' WHEN COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'FEATURE_INACTIVE' WHEN COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'MENU_INACTIVE' WHEN COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'MENU_CODE_INACTIVE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS issueType FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE R LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.FEATURE_CODE = R.FEATURE_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNAUTHORINFO A ON A.AUTHOR_CODE = R.AUTHOR_CODE WHERE F.FEATURE_CODE IS NULL OR COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' OR COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' OR COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' ORDER BY issueType, R.AUTHOR_CODE, R.FEATURE_CODE

SELECT O.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID AS targetId, COALESCE(O.MBER_TY_CODE, '') AS memberTypeCode, O.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode, COALESCE(F.MENU_CODE, '') AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, COALESCE(O.OVERRIDE_TYPE, '') AS overrideType, CASE WHEN F.FEATURE_CODE IS NULL THEN 'FEATURE_MISSING' WHEN COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'FEATURE_INACTIVE' WHEN COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'MENU_INACTIVE' WHEN COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' THEN 'MENU_CODE_INACTIVE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS issueType FROM COMTNUSERFEATUREOVERRIDE O LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.FEATURE_CODE = O.FEATURE_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(O.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND ( F.FEATURE_CODE IS NULL OR COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' OR COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' OR COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') != 'Y' ) ORDER BY issueType, O.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID, O.FEATURE_CODE
mapper.sql: ( COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/backup%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/restore%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/version%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/security%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/ip_whitelist%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/blocklist%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/access_history%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/error-log%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/unified_log%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/observability%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/code%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/auth/group%' )

( (R.AUTHOR_CODE = 'ROLE_SYSTEM_ADMIN' AND ( COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/backup%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/restore%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/version%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/access_history%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/error-log%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/unified_log%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/observability%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/security-audit%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/codex-request%' )) OR (R.AUTHOR_CODE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND ( COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/access_history%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/observability%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/security-audit%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/codex-request%' )) OR (R.AUTHOR_CODE = 'ROLE_OPERATION_ADMIN' AND ( COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/backup%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/restore%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/version%' OR COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') LIKE '/admin/system/access_history%' )) )
mapper.select: SELECT R.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, COALESCE(A.AUTHOR_NM, R.AUTHOR_CODE) AS authorNm, F.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, F.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE R INNER JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.FEATURE_CODE = R.FEATURE_CODE INNER JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNAUTHORINFO A ON A.AUTHOR_CODE = R.AUTHOR_CODE WHERE COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND AND R.AUTHOR_CODE != 'ROLE_SYSTEM_MASTER' AND NOT ORDER BY M.MENU_URL, R.AUTHOR_CODE, F.FEATURE_CODE
SELECT AUTHOR_CODE FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE WHERE FEATURE_CODE = #{_parameter} ORDER BY AUTHOR_CODE

SELECT R.AUTHOR_CODE AS authorCode, COALESCE(A.AUTHOR_NM, R.AUTHOR_CODE) AS authorNm, F.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, COALESCE(M.MENU_URL, '') AS menuUrl, F.FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE R INNER JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.FEATURE_CODE = R.FEATURE_CODE INNER JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNAUTHORINFO A ON A.AUTHOR_CODE = R.AUTHOR_CODE WHERE COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND AND R.AUTHOR_CODE IN ('ROLE_OPERATION_ADMIN', 'ROLE_COMPANY_ADMIN', 'ROLE_CS_ADMIN') AND NOT ORDER BY M.MENU_URL, R.AUTHOR_CODE, F.FEATURE_CODE
mapper.update:
UPDATE COMTNMENUINFO SET USE_AT = 'N' WHERE MENU_CODE IN
#{menuCode}

UPDATE COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO SET USE_AT = 'N' WHERE FEATURE_CODE IN
#{featureCode}

UPDATE COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO SET USE_AT = 'Y' WHERE FEATURE_CODE IN
#{featureCode}
mapper.select: SELECT FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode, COUNT(*) AS assignedRoleCount FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE GROUP BY FEATURE_CODE
SELECT FEATURE_CODE FROM COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE WHERE AUTHOR_CODE = #{_parameter} ORDER BY FEATURE_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNAUTHORINFO ( AUTHOR_CODE, AUTHOR_NM, AUTHOR_DC, AUTHOR_CREAT_DE ) VALUES ( #{authorCode}, #{authorNm}, #{authorDc}, #{authorCreatDe} )
INSERT INTO COMTNAUTHORFUNCTIONRELATE ( AUTHOR_CODE, FEATURE_CODE, GRANT_AUTHORITY_YN, CREAT_DT ) VALUES ( #{authorCode}, #{featureCode}, 'N', CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT S.AUTHOR_CODE FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO E INNER JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS S ON E.ESNTL_ID = S.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID WHERE E.EMPLYR_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT F.FEATURE_CODE FROM COMTNMENUINFO M INNER JOIN COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F ON F.MENU_CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(F.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND ( M.MENU_URL = #{_parameter} OR ('/' || M.MENU_URL) = #{_parameter} OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/approve' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-approve' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company-approve' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-approve' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/edit' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-edit' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/detail' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-detail' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/reset_password' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=password-reset' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/list' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/admin_list', '/admin/member/admin-list') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_list' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_detail' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-detail' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_account' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-account' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/admin_account' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-create' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/admin_account/permissions' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-permission' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/auth/group', '/admin/member/auth-group', '/admin/system/role') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=auth-group' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/auth-change', '/admin/system/auth-change') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=auth-change' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/dept-role-mapping', '/admin/system/dept-role-mapping') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=dept-role' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/system/sr-workbench' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=sr-workbench' ) ) AND F.FEATURE_CODE LIKE '%\_VIEW' ESCAPE '\' ORDER BY F.FEATURE_CODE
SELECT FEATURE_CODE FROM COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO WHERE MENU_CODE = #{_parameter} ORDER BY FEATURE_CODE

SELECT SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID AS scrtyDtrmnTrgetId, MBER_TY_CODE AS mberTyCode, FEATURE_CODE AS featureCode, OVERRIDE_TYPE AS overrideType, USE_AT AS useAt FROM COMTNUSERFEATUREOVERRIDE WHERE SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID = #{_parameter} AND COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY FEATURE_CODE

SELECT E.EMPLYR_ID AS emplyrId, E.USER_NM AS userNm, COALESCE(E.ORGNZT_ID, '') AS orgnztId, COALESCE(E.EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE, '') AS emplyrSttusCode, COALESCE(S.AUTHOR_CODE, '') AS authorCode, COALESCE(A.AUTHOR_NM, '') AS authorNm FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO E LEFT JOIN COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS S ON E.ESNTL_ID = S.SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID LEFT JOIN COMTNAUTHORINFO A ON A.AUTHOR_CODE = S.AUTHOR_CODE WHERE COALESCE(S.AUTHOR_CODE, '') != '' ORDER BY E.EMPLYR_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNUSERFEATUREOVERRIDE ( SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID, MBER_TY_CODE, FEATURE_CODE, OVERRIDE_TYPE, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{scrtyDtrmnTrgetId}, #{mberTyCode}, #{featureCode}, #{overrideType}, 'Y', #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNDEPTAUTHORRELATE SET CMPNY_NM = #{cmpnyNm}, AUTHOR_CODE = #{authorCode}, USE_AT = 'Y', LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{actorId}, LAST_UPDT_DT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE INSTT_ID = #{insttId} AND DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNDEPTAUTHORRELATE ( INSTT_ID, CMPNY_NM, DEPT_NM, AUTHOR_CODE, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{insttId}, #{cmpnyNm}, #{deptNm}, #{authorCode}, 'Y', #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
